name: claude-4-sonnet
description: Claude Sonnet 4 is a significant upgrade to 3.7, delivering superior coding and reasoning while responding more precisely to your instructions

extended_thinking.description: Whether to enable extended thinking mode (only supported for Sonnet 3.7 and Sonnet 4)
extended_thinking.title: Extended Thinking

image.description: Optional input image. Images are priced as (width px * height px)/750 input tokens
image.title: Image

max_image_resolution.description: Maximum image resolution in megapixels. Scales down image before sending it to Claude, to save time and money.
max_image_resolution.title: Max Image Resolution

thinking_budget_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to use for extended thinking when enabled (only supported for Sonnet 3.7 and Sonnet 4)
thinking_budget_tokens.title: Thinking Budget Tokens
